title: Custom Popup on status change
excerpt: Is there any way to display custom content ( text, image, video ) immediately in the popup window when status changes to ‘Done’. I have tried custom integrations, views but cannot find out a way to do this but things see…

posts.author: anish (Anish Sapkota)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to display custom content ( text, image, video ) immediately in the popup window when status changes to ‘Done’. I have tried custom integrations, views but cannot find out a way to do this but things seem little confusing.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, @anish - Welcome to the community! Currently, you can only trigger standard notifications with text content, not popup alerts. This could be built with a custom app however. Apps can trigger popups and could insert custom images, text, etc.

https://design.monday.com/03276924d/p/758e87-pop-ups shows how this should be designed in an app.

If you would like help building a custom app to do this - or just want to ask a few other questions about getting started with monday․com - let’s chat. You can set up a free more with monday․com consultation here: Book a call with Polished Geek: Do more with monday․com
